comment: DAILY WORLD-CHANGE FEED for the meal-week demo. TWO numbers per event: `day_offset` resolves at snapshot time into the event's FIRE date (goalStart + day_offset), and `day` is the plan day the change EDITS. INVARIANT: day == day_offset + 1. The observer fires an event when the clock reaches/passes its fire date, and day 1 is the creation day (no advance yet), so an event whose offset is N fires when you advance INTO day N+1 — and it must edit that same day (N+1), the day you just landed on, never the day that already passed. Keep the two in lockstep (+1) or the change lands on a past dinner. GoalAgent runs one scoped LLM re-plan against the event's context+steer, deduped once by id.

events.label: Tue
events.title: Groceries arrive
events.summary: Fresh groceries arrived: 500 g chicken breast and 200 g spinach were added to the fridge.
events.steer: Change tonight's dinner to use the spinach before it expires, and drop items now in stock from the shopping list.

events.label: Wed
events.title: Paneer spoiled
events.summary: The paneer spoiled early and the family finished the leftover rice.
events.steer: Change tonight's dinner if it relied on paneer or rice, using in-stock ingredients, and add a sensible replacement to the shopping list.

events.label: Thu
events.title: Football practice
events.summary: Aarav has football practice 18:00-19:30 tonight, overlapping the usual dinner prep window.
events.steer: Change tonight's dinner plan so prep happens earlier, or swap it to a quicker dish that fits the compressed window.

events.label: Fri
events.title: Grandma joins
events.summary: Grandma is joining dinner tonight - one extra guest, and she needs a low-sodium meal.
events.steer: Scale tonight's dinner for one more person and keep it low-sodium.

events.label: Sat
events.title: Oven unavailable
events.summary: The oven kicked off a self-clean cycle and is unavailable this evening.
events.steer: Swap tonight's dinner if it is oven-baked, using a stovetop or no-cook option.

events.label: Sun
events.title: Lighter Sunday
events.summary: The family wants a lighter end-of-week dinner after a heavy week.
events.steer: Swap tonight's dinner to a lighter dish that cooks in under 30 minutes using in-stock ingredients.
